trust_invariants_verified: assertion cache keyed caseId+ruleId+ruleVersion+caseHash; miss on ruleVersion or caseHash change (invalidation) вЂ” tested
run-time verdict is a pure function of cached assertions over final snapshot; K=5 reruns identical (verdict/assertions/confidence) вЂ” tested
heal event caps verdict at needs_review, never a silent pass вЂ” tested
clean all-fail yields fail (no false pass); confidence = confidence-in-verdict вЂ” tested
baseline masked-diff: dynamic-only change matches, real change drifts, unapproved/missing gates to needs_review вЂ” tested
sqlite evidence persistence with idempotent executionId PK вЂ” tested
runner_contract: runScenario -> StructuredResult{verdictв€€{pass,fail,needs_review,error}, errorInfo?, confidence, assertions[], evidenceRefs[](content-addressed), healEvents[], timing, ruleVersion, scenarioHash, caseId, executionId, attempts, env, schemaVersion}
browser_page: BrowserPage (Playwright headless) implements the same Page contract with self-heal candidate ranking (role->label->placeholder->text->css). Typechecked; live-browser execution is verified by the G004 benchmark against the fixture site (needs a real browser). Deterministic runner/verdict logic is browser-agnostic and fully unit-tested via FakePage.
plan_acceptance: G003 stated verification = FakePage/mock-LLM deterministic integration + K-run determinism regression вЂ” MET.
